description: Drawstring backpack with vibrant yellow wax-cotton print featuring stylized leaf motifs, contrasted by a denim base and red-striped cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack in bright yellow wax-cotton featuring bold peacock-inspired motifs and matching yellow cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack with cheerful yellow floral-dot cotton print panel, set on a denim base and finished with white cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack featuring an abstract watercolor brushstroke print in pastel hues on a satin panel, accented by vertical denim stripe details and a denim base with white cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack with a soft pastel floral watercolor satin print, contrasted by a denim base and white cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack featuring a playful cartoon puppy print on white cotton, with red-striped cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack with bold abstract tribal-inspired motifs in yellow and red on cotton, accented by red-striped cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack in red cotton with a large embroidered floral applique, contrasted by a denim base and white cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack featuring a cute bear-and-heart patchwork print on cotton, finished with white cotton drawcord straps.
Patchwork drawstring backpack with four cotton print panels—florals, ditsy blooms and stripes—set on a denim base with chambray drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack with black-and-white cotton patchwork panels (floral, gingham, polka dot, text print) set on a denim base and finished with white cotton drawcord straps.
Child's drawstring backpack in bright yellow cotton featuring a stork-and-puppy cartoon panel, finished with red-striped cotton drawcord straps.
Child's drawstring backpack in bright yellow cotton featuring a cow-and-turtle cartoon panel, finished with red-striped cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack with green cotton patchwork panels (polka dot, ditsy floral, stripe, micro-floral) set on a denim base and finished with green-and-white cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack with pink-and-white cotton patchwork panels (heart prints, gingham, tiny floral) set on a denim base and finished with white cotton drawcord straps.
Drawstring backpack with black-and-white cotton patchwork panels (floral, gingham, polka dot, text print) set on a denim base and finished with white cotton drawcord straps.
Child's drawstring backpack in bright yellow cotton featuring a stork-and-puppy cartoon panel, finished with red-striped cotton drawcord straps.
